title: Centre for Theoretical Cosmology
body: The Centre for Theoretical Cosmology is a research centre within the Department of Applied Mathematics and Theoretical Physics  at the University of Cambridge. Founded by Stephen Hawking in 2007, it encourages new thinking on some of the most challenging problems in science, thereby intending to advance the scientific understanding of the universe.
